info.title: CodeTorch.Agent.Cli
info.description: CodeTorch Agent CLI (cta) - Command-line tool for agent operations including dev slot deployments, status checks, and verification.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: CodeTorch Agent CLI - Deploy to preview slots

commands.name: claim
commands.description: Claim dev slots for a task

commands.name: release
commands.description: Release dev slots claimed by a task

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all slots assigned to a task or all slots in a workspace

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show deployment status for each slot

commands.name: urls
commands.description: Output slot URLs in machine-readable format

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy artifact to a dev slot

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Run health checks against deployed apps

commands.name: sources
commands.description: List log sources available to a task

commands.name: query
commands.description: Query logs for a source in task scope
